title: Verify Loss Aversion Exit Gate appears when clicking Cancel
description: Test that the loss aversion intervention displays before allowing cancellation
preconditions: Trial is active with remaining days

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Trial Corner > Manage Trial section

expected_result: Warning screen displays with headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days', body text about losing remaining days, and two action buttons with 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' as high prominence
